context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 verified NEW FEATURES: IP blocking system fully working (block, unblock, get list, security overview count). Comparison tables updated to 14 features with all checkmarks for Sentinel X/J/S (including E-SIM integrada, Con cámara y con internet, Funciona en segundo plano). FloatingSOSButton works on all pages with expanded panel showing emergency call buttons. FreeTrialBanner visible on public pages with 'Probar gratis' button. BackgroundModeSection explains E-SIM and segundo plano functionality. StockUrgencyPopup appears after 8 seconds on session start. Mobile config files have correct background location permissions (AndroidManifest.xml, Info.plist). CEO Dashboard Security section has IP blocking panel with table and activity log.
